name: llms-txt-advisor-marketplace
description: Evidence-based advisory plugin for llms.txt — cold-start interview, audit, generation, deployment, and stakeholder communication. Works across 18 sectors, 13 languages, and any MCP connector via ~~category placeholders.

plugins.name: llms-txt-advisor
plugins.description: Evidence-based guidance for implementing, auditing, generating, or deciding on llms.txt files. Cold-start interview for new sites, audit for existing files, deployment guidance, stakeholder communication. Grounded in three independent empirical studies (SE Ranking n=300k, OtterlyAI 90-day logs, Search Engine Land 10-site test). Refuses to over-promise; sets realistic expectations.

plugins.name: llms-txt-bootstrap
plugins.description: Self-contained agent bundle for new sites starting from scratch — orientation, configuration, file generation, and deployment in one package.

plugins.name: llms-txt-migration
plugins.description: Self-contained agent bundle for sites with existing files needing improvement — audit, customize, regenerate, deploy, communicate the migration.
